texto: Mindfulness is simply being aware of what is happening right now without wishing it were different
autor: enjoying the pleasant without holding on when it changes (which it will)
explicacao: Citação de enjoying the pleasant without holding on when it changes (which it will) sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Mindfulness is simply being aware of what is happening right now without wishing it were different” articula reflexao, inspiracional, mindfulness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
